site_description: PaN Training is a platform providing training resources for the photon & neutron community.

content_types.description: Individual training materials, often workflows or analyses, covering specific scientific topics.

navigation.description: Materials are listed across multiple pages, accessible via pagination.

examples.title: Analysis of plant scRNA-Seq Data with Scanpy
Whole Genome Sequencing of SARS-CoV-2 genomes with Nextclade
examples.description: A workflow that implements the Nextclade pipeline for SARS-CoV-2 variant analysis.

examples.title: M. tuberculosis Variant Analysis
examples.description: Analysis of M. tuberculosis genomes to identify variants and understand drug resistance.

examples.title: Mutation calling, viral genome reconstruction and lineage/clade assignment from SARS-CoV-2 sequencing data
examples.description: A workflow for analysing SARS-CoV-2 sequencing data to identify mutations, reconstruct genomes and assign lineages.

content_types.typical_structure: Each material listing includes a title, a short description, and a unique URL.

content_types.description: Specific workflows designed for data analysis, often linked to particular tools or pipelines.

navigation.description: Workflows are filterable by space, but the page currently shows zero workflows.

content_types.typical_structure: Currently no workflows are listed, but expected structure is similar to TrainingMaterials: title, description, URL.

content_types.description: Curated sequences of training materials designed to guide users through a specific learning objective.

navigation.description: Learning Paths can be filtered by space and archived status, but the page currently shows no learning paths.

content_types.typical_structure: Expected structure is a list of paths, each with a title, description, and URL. Currently no items exist.

content_types.description: Collections of training materials organized around a specific project, institution, or topic.

navigation.description: Spaces are listed on a single page, potentially with pagination.

examples.title: de.KCD Training Materials
examples.description: A space for training materials related to de.KCD.

examples.title: DALIA
examples.description: A space containing 820 training materials related to DALIA.

examples.title: EOSC Academy
examples.description: A space for training materials related to the EOSC Academy.

examples.title: OERHub.at
examples.description: A space for training materials related to OERHub.at.

content_types.typical_structure: Each Space listing includes a title, a description, and a URL pointing to the space's page.
